title: Trump calls Situation Room meeting for 'final determination' on Iran deal — demands Hormuz open immediately, no nuclear weapons ever
snippet: President Trump announced he is convening a Situation Room meeting to make a 'final determination' on whether to move forward with the Iran deal. Trump issued public demands: Iran must agree to 'never have a Nuclear Weapon or Bomb' and the Strait of Hormuz must be 'immediately open, no tolls, unrestricted shipping.' The announcement followed days of diplomatic back-and-forth over the MoU, with both sides disputing terms. Trump's Situation Room meeting involves top national security advisers including Hegseth, Rubio, and Vance.
tag_reason: Major escalation in deal timeline — Trump personally convening Situation Room for final determination, first definitive presidential deadline signal
